title: TeslaUSB B-1 release manifest (host tooling)
description: Rich metadata for a release. HOST/CI-ONLY: the Pi-side trust path verifies SHA256SUMS + manifest.env (coreutils, no JSON), never this file. See docs/tasks/phase7-0-contract.md §3.

release_version.description: Semver or release tag; mirrors RELEASE_VERSION in manifest.env.

git_commit.description: Full 40-hex commit the artifacts were built from.

target_triple.description: Rust target triple. Override only for a documented new board.

unit_set_version.description: Version of the installed systemd unit set.

spa_bundle_sha256.description: Digest of the C-sorted spa/ lines of SHA256SUMS (contract §3.3).

binaries.description: Per-binary records. sha256 values MUST match the corresponding SHA256SUMS lines.

path.description: Relative path inside the release tree.

signature.description: Optional authenticity metadata (off by default). When present, SHA256SUMS.sig is verified against a repo-pinned key.
